prompt: Conceptual art, magazine cover. A giant, crumbling stone tower made of thousands of dark, huddled gray prison-cell blocks forming a massive, heavy base. The top level is a single, singular, polished gold and crystal platform. A glowing yellow light from the gold top illuminates the suffering structure below. High contrast, cinematic shadows. NO charts, NO labels, NO text. Pure metaphor of power.
dataset_name: Oxfam: Davos 2024 (based on World Bank data)
insight: The 1% possess an explosive, singular concentration of wealth that is violently out of balance with the combined existence of the 99%.
